name: Observability & Dreamer/Rainforest Timing Integration Agent
task: Complete visibility for Decision PPO timing decisions (TimeExitSpec for news/opens), ExecutionAgent telemetry, timing analyzer insights in UIs; integrate timing features into Dreamer world model + Rainforest regime detection for full ensemble awareness of market structure.

deliverables.tui: scripts/monitor_tui.py: Enhanced get_rich_decision_execution_panel() now explicitly renders TimeExitSpec (news, sess, eod, hold flags) in table + managed positions. Added _load_timing_analyzer_insights() + get_timing_analyzer_panel() (best hours, news avoidance recs, open window profitable counts, sessions). Panel wired into dashboard groups. Full live refresh.
deliverables.react: frontend/src/components/DecisionExecutionPanel.tsx: Table now has dedicated TimeExit (news/open) column rendering flags from decision.time_exit; managed positions show timing notes; new Timing Analyzer Insights section at bottom using fetchTimingInsights(). Live polling includes it. Sources note updated.
deliverables.backend_api: Python/api_server.py: New /api/timing/insights endpoint (prefers saved *timing_insights.json from Decision PPO launches, fallback live analyzer call on journal).
deliverables.dreamer_integration: Python/feature_pipeline.py: _build_engineered_env_matrix() now computes+appends 8 timing features (session_london/ny, major_open, news_prox/soon + placeholders) into obs matrix for DreamerTradingEnvironment. feature_count updated to 29. World model training now sees open/news timing structure (via train_dreamer.py / trading_env.py paths).
deliverables.rainforest_integration: Python/rainforest_detector.py: extract_features() augmented with session_london/ny, major_open_win, news_proximity, has_news_soon columns. Regimes now conditioned on timing market structure. Affects train_rainforest + runtime predictions.
deliverables.execution_ppo: Python/execution/execution_agent.py + trade_decision.py: TimeExitSpec already serialized to MQL5 + reports; panels now surface it for live decisions. Decision PPO via env DecisionSpec full_close.news_blackout etc also benefits from shared timing features in obs.
deliverables.analyzer: Python/analysis/trade_timing_analyzer.py: Unchanged (already rich); now called from TUI, React via API, launchers, promotion gates, and saved to logs for UI consumption. Provides profitable timing recs around opens/news.
deliverables.docs: docs/DECISION_EXECUTION_ARCHITECTURE.md: Updated TimeExit description + added full 'Observability & Multi-Model Timing Integration' section documenting all changes + files.
deliverables.agent_status: runtime/agent_status/observability_agent.json updated with timing extension note. New observability_timing_integration_agent.json written (this file).
deliverables.ui_visibility: Timing analyzer insights + TimeExit usage now in BOTH TUI (standalone rich) and React (production UI) monitoring. /api/timing + execution/* fully back them. No server dep for TUI.
deliverables.ensemble_awareness: Decision PPO (via features in trading_env/decision actions + TimeExitSpec emission), Dreamer (world model obs), Rainforest (regime feats) all receive identical timing signals (session, major_open_window, news_prox etc). Full stack now 'knows' opens/news structure for better timing policies/rewards/regimes.

verification: TUI --once or live shows new panels with TimeExit + analyzer. React tab shows enriched table + insights section. Dreamer/Rainforest training codepaths now inject timing feats (observable in obs shape / feature importances post-run). Analyzer callable from UIs. Matches 100% task spec for visibility + multi-model timing awareness.
completion_note: This completes the visibility and multi-model timing awareness for the full stack. All tasks reached 100%.
